  1. org.springframework.ai.model.tool

Uses of Package
org.springframework.ai.model.tool

Packages that use org.springframework.ai.model.tool
Package
Description
org.springframework.ai.anthropic
Spring AI integration with Anthropic's Claude models using the official Anthropic Java SDK.
org.springframework.ai.bedrock.converse
 
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor
Provides classes for advising chat clients.
org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor.toolsearch
Tool Search Tool Advisor package for dynamic tool discovery and search capabilities.
org.springframework.ai.deepseek
 
org.springframework.ai.google.genai
 
org.springframework.ai.google.genai.schema
 
org.springframework.ai.mistralai
 
org.springframework.ai.model.anthropic.autoconfigure
 
org.springframework.ai.model.bedrock.converse.autoconfigure
 
org.springframework.ai.model.deepseek.autoconfigure
 
org.springframework.ai.model.google.genai.autoconfigure.chat
 
org.springframework.ai.model.mistralai.autoconfigure

org.springframework.ai.model.tool
 
org.springframework.ai.ollama
 
org.springframework.ai.ollama.api
 
org.springframework.ai.openai
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.model.tool used by org.springframework.ai.anthropic
    Class
    Description
    DefaultToolCallingChatOptions.Builder
    Default implementation of ToolCallingChatOptions.Builder.
    StructuredOutputChatOptions
    Mixin interface for ChatModels that support structured output.
    StructuredOutputChatOptions.Builder
     
    ToolCallingChatOptions
    A set of options that can be used to configure the interaction with a chat model, including tool calling.
    ToolCallingChatOptions.Builder
    A builder to create a ToolCallingChatOptions instance.
    ToolCallingManager
    Service responsible for managing the tool calling process for a chat model.

  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.model.tool used by org.springframework.ai.chat.client.advisor
    Class
    Description
    ToolCallingManager
    Service responsible for managing the tool calling process for a chat model.
    ToolExecutionEligibilityChecker
    Interface for determining when tool execution should be performed based on model responses.
    ToolExecutionResult
    The result of a tool execution.
